I understand that since many Ukrainians are currently using the services of carriers, there's a service for every budget - from cheaper to more comfortable, and of course, it will be more expensive.
But for me, what's more important right now isn't the money itself, but the condition I'll arrive in.
15 hours on a bus is really not easy. In the cheapest option, there are many people, it's cramped, the seats don't recline... 
I'll just arrive very tired. And I want to arrive at your place looking beautiful, relaxed, in a good mood, so that our meeting can be truly enjoyable from the very first minutes.

A minibus is a completely different level of comfort - fewer people, your own space, a calm journey. And then I'll arrive at your place not 'exhausted', but with energy for us.
I think you yourself want me to feel good and comfortable around you. And the journey is part of our meeting.
I really'm not asking for anything extra. I just want to arrive at your place in a way that we can both enjoy this time together))
